title: Fayetteville, NC (511 North McPherson Church Rd)

stages.desc: One of 6 3-Stages in North Carolina to undergo Concept Unification. 6th to Last 3-Stage in North Carolina. 3-Stage was reverted back into a Rock-afire Explosion show after the Fayetteville CEC closed and rebranded as Billy Bob's. The same store would reopen as a new CEC in 1998.
